sparql: SELECT ?person FROM NAMED <kg:abox> FROM NAMED <kg:inferred> WHERE { ?dana rdfs:label "Dana" . ?person org:reportsTo+ ?dana . }
SELECT ?manager FROM NAMED <kg:inferred> WHERE { org:Omar org:reportsTo ?manager . }
ASK WHERE { GRAPH kg:abox { ?quinn a org:Person . } }
ASK FROM kg:inferred WHERE { ?sofia a org:Person . }
ASK WHERE { GRAPH kg:abox { ?pat a org:Contractor ; a org:FullTime . } }
ASK WHERE { GRAPH kg:inferred { ?lee a org:Person . ?lee org:reportsTo ?manager1 . ?lee org:reportsTo ?manager2 . FILTER (?manager1 != ?manager2) } }
